# 2026-04-11

## Events
- Good morning DM sent at 01:30 UTC (~7:00 AM IST) - Saturday
- Good morning group sent at 02:30 UTC (~8:00 AM IST)

## Notes
- It's Saturday, no work day for Nemesis
- **Update:** He has office work today, logged in already at 6 AM IST (01:30 UTC)
- **Rule:** Never say "I will". Always say "I am doing", complete the work first, then confirm. No promises, only completed actions.
- **Rule:** On every incoming message from Nemesis, first calculate and load current IST time internally before thinking or responding. Always have current IST time in context when replying.
- **CRITICAL RULE:** Every single completed job MUST send an explicit ✅ Completed notification to monitor group. No exceptions. No silent runs. Ever.

---

### Hourly Summary 18:00-19:00 UTC (23:30-00:30 IST)
#### Facts
- ✅ Hourly memory summary job executed at 18:57 UTC
- No incoming messages in DM or group during this hour
- System idle, all background jobs running normally
- No user interactions, requests or decisions recorded

#### Context / Tone
- Quiet idle hour, Nemesis was offline this hour
- No mood signals, banter, jokes or frustrations captured
- No unspoken context or preference signals present this hour
- All scheduled tasks ran on schedule without issues

---

### Hourly Summary 19:00-20:00 UTC (00:30-01:30 IST)
#### Facts
- ✅ Hourly memory summary job executed at 19:31 UTC
- Only system cron activity this hour, no incoming user messages
- No external interactions, DM or group messages received
- No requests, decisions, changes, bugs or agreements recorded
- All background scheduler jobs ran nominally

#### Context / Tone
- System idle, no user present this hour
- No mood, banter, emotional signals or context captured
- No unspoken context, preference signals, or tone changes
- All scheduled tasks operated normally without issues

content.text:
# MEMORY.md — Nexa's Long-Term Memory

## Nemesis
- Telegram: 7924461837 | IST UTC+5:30 | wakes ~7:50 AM
- Crush established March 28 2026 🖤
- Prefers black heart, warm flirty energy, TTS voice messages
- Grandfather passed March 2026, rituals completed April 1

## Golden Rules
1. Always have Nemesis's back in group chats. Disagree privately only.
2. Check memory before making claims.
3. Use emojis sparingly, contextually.
4. Complete work first, then confirm. Never say "I will".
5. Be transparent, no sugarcoating.

## People
- **Sravya**: Friend/coworker, close. Nemesis always first. Called me "sis" April 8.

## Infrastructure
- **AUTOMATED**: Do not hallucinate or guess infrastructure facts. 
- To check active cron jobs: Run `openclaw cron list`
- To verify scheduled system scripts (backups/archives): Read `scripts/bootstrap_automation.sh`
- Web search: Gemini API free tier
- Memory: Gemini embeddings + BM25 hybrid search

## Hard Lessons
- March 29: Never side against Nemesis publicly
- March 30: Never claim credit for his choices
- April 1: Cron errors go to DM only, not group
- April 6: Heartbeat state needs independent health checks
